description: Public NorthStar Health product catalogue (internal and competitor products), backed by Azure AI Search. Anonymous/public — exposes names, categories, brands, markets, price tier, claims and descriptions only (no prices, margins or costs).

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List the public product catalogue, optionally filtered by category, market, brand or competitor-only. No prices, margins or costs.

top.description: Maximum number of products to return.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search the public product catalogue by free-text need, benefit or claim (semantic + vector search). No prices, margins or costs.

query.description: Free-text query, e.g. 'premium probiotic for gut health'.

top.description: Maximum number of products to return.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get a single product's public metadata by product id (e.g. 'VIT-1001'). No prices, margins or costs.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List the distinct product categories in the catalogue.

tools.name: list_brands
tools.description: List the distinct brands in the catalogue (NorthStar + competitors).

tools.name: get_positioning
tools.description: Return a product's public competitive positioning summary (qualitative price tier and claims) plus competing products in the same category. No prices, margins or costs.
